odoo_summary: Field is `priority` (Selection 0=Normal, 1=Favorite), rendered by Odoo's priority widget as a star.
idempiere_summary: No favourite column on M_Product. Cleanest fit: per-user pref table.

odoo_summary: Opens stock.quant filtered by product; inline edit on On Hand Quantity calls _set_inventory_quantity which generates an inventory adjustment stock.move.
idempiere_summary: Read via MStorageOnHand.get/getOfProduct; inline edit posts an Inventory document (MInventory) with InventoryType=I.

odoo_summary: Pure ir.actions.act_window targeting product.product with domain product_tmpl_id=id. Smart-button visible only when product_variant_count > 1.
idempiere_summary: No template-level variants in iDempiere. Adapter must synthesise from M_Attribute combinations or write a new lookup.

odoo_summary: Opens stock.replenish wizard; on confirm creates procurement.group + stock.move(s) honouring the active routes.
idempiere_summary: Replenishment Report process reads M_Replenish settings per warehouse+product and generates an M_Requisition.

odoo_summary: Single field write to product.template.list_price. The Incl-Taxes suffix is UI-side; no backend method computes it on write.
idempiere_summary: iDempiere stores price on M_ProductPrice rows under M_PriceList_Version, not on M_Product. BFF must resolve active version per tenant.

odoo_summary: M2M write to taxes_id (relation product_template_account_tax_rel). Incl-Taxes suffix is rendered client-side.
idempiere_summary: iDempiere binds C_TaxCategory_ID on M_Product; actual tax resolves at order/invoice line.

odoo_summary: Write to detailed_type. _onchange_type at line 459 is a no-op stub. Sync via _sanitize_vals + @api.depends('detailed_type').
idempiere_summary: iDempiere ProductType enum is narrower (I/S/R/E/O/A). Storable=I+IsStocked=Y; Consumable=I+IsStocked=N; Service=S.

odoo_summary: Creates product.template.attribute.line. Saving triggers _create_variant_ids which materialises product.product cartesian.
idempiere_summary: No native equivalent. iDempiere binds attributes per document line via M_AttributeSetInstance, never per template.

odoo_summary: O2M create on seller_ids (product.supplierinfo). Standard CRUD on a child model.
rpc_signature: {model:'product.supplierinfo', method:'create', args:[{product_tmpl_id, partner_id, price, currency_id, delay, min_qty}]}
idempiere_summary: Direct equivalent: M_Product_PO is the vendor-pricelist line on a product.

odoo_summary: mail.thread.message_post creates mail.message + per-follower mail.notification rows.
idempiere_summary: MNote covers per-record sticky notes only; no follower or subtype model. Need a custom mixin for true chatter.
